codeReview.summary: Current HEAD satisfies the feature contract. Commit 727cb6b removes the final explicit 15000 ms timeout override from the compare summary test and adds a dedicated current-head proof test that exercises mocked DeFiLlama-backed onchain network, dex, and pool expansion behavior directly from the repository’s present route/test surface.

summary: Reviewed the feature handoff, transcript skeleton, worker skill, commit 727cb6b diff, and current HEAD tests. The compare summary test no longer carries the 15000 ms timeout override (`tests/compare-coingecko.test.ts:1185`), and the new proof test added at `tests/app.test.ts:1920` explicitly validates live-expanded onchain catalog behavior on current HEAD, so scrutiny no longer depends on prior commit attribution. No blocking or non-blocking code issues found.
